zh.terms.title: 规则与条款
zh.terms.1: 本活动自 2026年5月7日 00:00:00 (GMT+8) 起生效，仅适用于 Longfu88 之新玩家。
zh.terms.2: 活动期间前 300 名成功注册之玩家，即可获得 Wealth of the East (Ela Games) 之 88 次免费旋转。
zh.terms.3: 每位符合资格之玩家仅限领取一次（1次）免费旋转。免费旋转在发放后的 7 天内有效，逾期将自动失效。
zh.terms.4: 免费旋转所产生的盈利务必在 7 天内于老虎机游戏完成 40 倍投注额，方可申请提款。
zh.terms.5: 本活动最高提款金额为 50 USD ，超出的金额系统自动取消，烦请见谅。
zh.terms.6: 仅限老虎机游戏之投注额计入流水要求。具体包含之老虎机游戏清单请参阅一般规则与条款。
zh.terms.7: 仅在玩家没有任何未完成之投注额要求时，提款申请才会被受理。
zh.terms.8: 玩家可联系线上客服申请豁免投注额要求。
zh.terms.9: Longfu88 保留随时自行更改、更新、修改或终止活动之权利，恕不另行通知。
zh.terms.10: 本活动适用于 Longfu88 一般规则与条款。

en.terms.title: Terms & Conditions
en.terms.1: This promotion applies to new Longfu88 players from 05/7/2026 00:00:00 (GMT+8).
en.terms.2: The first 300 players who register an account will receive 88 free spins on Wealth of the East (Ela Games).
en.terms.3: Free spins will be credited once (1x) throughout the promo period with the qualifying registration. Credited free spins will expire 7 days after issuance.
en.terms.4: Free spins winnings must be wagered forty times (40x) on Casino Slots within 7 days prior to withdrawal.
en.terms.5: Winnings from free spins are capped at $50. Any winnings that exceed the capped amount will be forfeited.
en.terms.6: Only Casino Slots games will count towards wagering contribution. List of included casino slots games are provided under General Terms and Conditions.
en.terms.7: Withdrawal will only be processed once a player no longer has any active wagering requirement.
en.terms.8: Player can request a waiver of the rollover requirement by contacting Customer Service.
en.terms.9: Longfu reserves the right to change, update, modify, or cancel this promotion at any time without prior notice.
